title: Creative Director at IT&C: e-commerce and ISP services
description: Coordination of design teams and webmasters for corporate branding and various websites, including e-commerce sites and cultural reference portals.
body:
**IT&C** was a company that offered e-commerce and ISP connectivity services in the early years of the .com bubble. As **Creative Director**, I was responsible for defining the visual identity of digital projects and coordinating the design and webmaster teams.

## Creative Leadership

The role involved managing multiple projects in parallel, from defining the brand identity to overseeing development. It required maintaining visual consistency across diverse projects and adapting to the changing demands of a booming industry.

## Featured Projects

-   [bikercom.com](https://www.bikercom.com/) — E-commerce for motorcycle accessories, one of the first in the Spanish market.
-   [mortadeloyfilemon.com](https://www.mortadeloyfilemon.com/) — Official portal for the comic book characters Mortadelo and Filemón, featuring interactive content and a fan area.

## Team and Client Management

Coordination between designers, developers, and clients was a fundamental part of the job. The ability to establish clear processes and communicate creative decisions effectively was key to the smooth running of the projects.

## Technologies and Tools

-   Creative Direction
-   Branding
-   Web Design
-   E-commerce
-   Team Management
